summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Talent Development professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in insights, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve talent growth and experience—through human-centered, systematic approaches.

sections.title: About the Role
sections.content: The Career Development Specialist supports and manages {ex|performance management} and {ex|career development} processes for BCG consulting staff. Reports to the Career Development Manager.

sections.title: Compensation
sections.content: $71,000–$99,000 base + up to 16% discretionary bonus + 5–10% retirement contribution. Hybrid 3–5 days/week in office.

sections.title: H1B Status
sections.content: ✅ Confirmed — 1,674 LCA filings FY2022–2024, ~100% approval rate, ranked #74 US sponsor.
